title: Enhanced Overlay
description: Settings for Hitboxes, Scoreboard, Chat, Subtitles, Tablist, Debug Screen, Nametags, and Text Displays and an option for a fake Enchantment Glint
body:
**Enhanced Overlay**

Settings for:
- Hitboxes
- Scoreboard
- Chat
- Subtitles
- Tablist
- Debug Screen
- Nametags
- Text Displays

Adds an option for a fake Enchantment Glint that you can add to any item that renders like the normal Enchantment Glint does so it uses the same texture.

Uses [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) for the config.

---

Set text background opacity to 0 in the Minecraft Accessibility Settings to disable the chat background as well.

---

**Compatibility:**

- Should be compatible with most Fabric mods
- Partially compatible with PVP Clients like Lunar and Feather, you just have to try it and see if it works, some settings just work, some don't and for some you have to change settings in the client settings.
